ValidationRule.description: Keeps payer role and payer order aligned for the demo model.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Primary"), Payer_Order__c <> 1), AND(ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Secondary"), Payer_Order__c <> 2), AND(ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Tertiary"), Payer_Order__c <> 3) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Primary must be order 1, Secondary must be order 2, and Tertiary must be order 3.
